---
title: '`r paste0(emojifont::emoji("wave"), "Hey there!")`'
description: >
  I'm a data scientist and all-around problem solver with experience building 
  data products in fast growing companies across Asia Pacific. I'm passionate 
  about providing people with access to data and technology that powers their 
  daily lives.
site: distill::distill_website
---

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;1,400;1,600&family=IBM+Plex+Serif:wght@600&display=swap');
</style>

```{r setup}
library(jsonlite)
library(magrittr)
library(purrr)
library(htmltools)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

listing_html <- function(title = NULL,
                         class,
                         description = NULL, 
                         json_listing, 
                         more_articles, 
                         num_articles = 3L) {
  if (file.exists(json_listing)) {
    tibble(entry = read_json(json_listing)) %>% 
      mutate(date = as_datetime(map_chr(entry, "date"))) %>% 
      arrange(desc(date)) %>% 
      filter(row_number() <= num_articles) %>% 
      pull(entry) %>% 
      distill:::html_for_articles() %>% (
        function(article_html) {
          article_html[[2]][[1]][[2]]$children[[1]]$attribs$style <-
            "margin-top: 0px;"
          article_html[[2]][[1]][[2]]$children[[2]] <-
            tags$div(
              style = "margin-bottom: 50px;",
              tags$a(
                href = more_articles,
                "See all articles »"
              )
            )
          article_html[[2]][[1]][[2]]$attribs$class <- 
            paste(article_html[[2]][[1]][[2]]$attribs$class, class) %>% 
            stringr::str_replace("l-page", "l-body-outset")
          tagList(
            article_html,
            tags$script(HTML(glue::glue(.open = "{{", .close = "}}", "
              $('.{{class}}')
                .prepend(
                  $('<hr/>')
                    .css('margin-top', '20px')
                    .css('margin-bottom', '5px')
                )
                .prepend(
                  $('<div/>')
                    .addClass('uk-text-meta posts-list-description')
                    .css('max-width', '700px')
                    .html('{{description}}')
                )
                .prepend(
                  $('<h3/>')
                    .css('font-size', '1.8em')
                    .css('margin-bottom', '10px')
                    .css('margin-top', '0')
                    .html('{{title}}')
                );
            ")))
          )
        }
      )
  }
}

```

```{r Posts}
listing_html(
  # title = paste(emojifont::emoji("black_nib"), "Blog Posts"),
  class = "blog-posts",
  # description = glue::glue(
  #   "Blog posts are the results of projects, deep analyses on topical or other ",
  #   "issues, or commentary on a specific issue. My favorite topics involve the ",
  #   "Philippines, economics, politics, and of course data science and analytics."
  # ),
  json_listing = "_site/posts/posts.json",
  more_articles = "blog.html"
)
```
